site.name: Vincent Lavallée
site.tagline: Full-stack engineer building clean, scalable products.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Vincent.
hero.subtitle: I build fast, reliable web apps and APIs.

about.title: About
about.intro: I’m a full-stack engineer focused on product quality, clean architecture, and great DX.

background.title: My Background
background.content: Passionate about software development for several years, I've gained solid experience building modern, scalable web applications. My journey has allowed me to work on various projects, from full-stack development to complex system architecture.

items.details: Specialization in web development and software architecture. Final project focused on distributed applications.
Foundations in programming, data structures, and algorithms.

items.title: Emerging Technologies
items.description: Always curious to explore new technologies and frameworks. Particularly interested in AI, machine learning, and cloud-native architectures.

items.title: Open Source
items.description: Active contributor to several open source projects. Strongly believe in knowledge sharing and collaborative learning.

items.title: Mentoring
items.description: Passionate about teaching and mentoring. Regularly help beginners start their development careers.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A few things I've shipped or experimented with.
projects.exploreText: Browse through different categories of projects using the sidebar. Each category contains detailed information about specific projects.

personal.description: Personal projects built to solve real-world problems and explore new technologies.

school.description: Academic projects demonstrating skills learned in various computer science courses.

pmc.description: Major Design Project - Comprehensive capstone engineering project.

personal.overviewIntro: This section showcases personal projects I've built in my free time to explore new technologies, solve real-world problems, and continuously improve my development skills.
personal.overviewDetails: Each project represents a unique learning opportunity and demonstrates my ability to work independently from concept to deployment. Select a project from the sidebar to view detailed information.

school.subtitle: Academic projects from university courses
school.overviewIntro: These projects were completed as part of my university coursework, demonstrating my ability to apply theoretical knowledge to practical implementations.
school.overviewDetails: Each project includes comprehensive documentation, testing, and follows best practices taught in the respective courses. Select a project from the sidebar to view details.

pmcPage.subtitle: Major Design Project - Final Year Capstone
pmcPage.overviewIntro: The PMC (Projet Majeur de Conception) is a year-long capstone engineering project that brings together all the knowledge acquired throughout the engineering program.
pmcPage.overviewDetails: This collaborative project involved working with a multidisciplinary team to design, develop, and validate a complete engineering solution. Select a phase from the sidebar to explore the journey.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Stuff I've worked on recently.
experience.exploreText: Explore my professional work experience and volunteer involvement using the sidebar. Each section contains detailed information about specific roles and contributions.

djobInternship.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Développement de nouvelles fonctionnalités pour la plateforme de recrutement en ligne de Djob.
Collaboration avec les équipes de produit et de design pour créer des interfaces utilisateur intuitives.
Optimisation des performances et amélioration de la scalabilité de l'application.
achievements: Livraison de plusieurs fonctionnalités clés qui ont amélioré l'expérience utilisateur et augmenté l'engagement sur la plateforme.
Contribution à la refactorisation du code backend, réduisant les temps de réponse de l'API de 30%.

work.description: Professional work experience including internships, part-time positions, and research roles.

implications.description: Leadership roles in student organizations and volunteer work in the community.

work.subtitle: Professional work experience and internships
work.overviewIntro: My professional journey has included diverse roles across different industries and technologies, each contributing to my growth as a software developer.
work.overviewDetails: From internships to full-time positions, I've gained hands-on experience with modern development practices, team collaboration, and delivering production-ready solutions. Select a position from the sidebar for details.

implicationsPage.subtitle: Leadership roles and volunteer involvement
implicationsPage.overviewIntro: Beyond professional work, I've been actively involved in various leadership and volunteer roles that have shaped my soft skills and community engagement.
implicationsPage.overviewDetails: These experiences have taught me valuable lessons in leadership, organization, communication, and the importance of giving back to the community. Select a role from the sidebar to learn more.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Want to build something together? Send me a message.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon!

availability.title: Availability
availability.details: I am currently available for new projects and collaborations. Feel free to reach out to discuss your needs.
